writer.name: 吉亚卡摩·普契尼 Giacomo Puccini

director.name: 安德烈亚斯·霍莫基 Andreas Homoki

this_title: Bregenz Festival: Madama Butterfly on the Lake
trans_title: 布雷根茨音乐节歌剧《蝴蝶夫人》
introduction: Giacomo Puccini‘s Madama Butterfly is performed for the first time on the Bregenz lake stage, directed by Andreas Homoki, conducted by Enrique Mazzola and Yi-Chen Lin, with sets designed by Michael Levine and costumes by Antony McDonald.This new Bregenz Festival production premiered on July 20, 2022. Michael Levine’s inspiring idea for the stage was that of a beautiful, older Japanese scroll painting thrown on the lake. “You take this piece of paper, a representation of the beauty of Japan,” says Levine, “and then you discard it on the lake, which is somehow intrinsic in what is taking place in Madama Butterfly.”
chinese_title: 布雷根茨音乐节歌剧《蝴蝶夫人》
foreign_title: Bregenz Festival: Madama Butterfly on the Lake
